markets.question: Spread: MFK Karviná (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Czechia Fortuna Liga game, scheduled for March 15 at 10:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "MFK Karviná" if MFK Karviná win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "SK Sigma Olomouc".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on fortunaliga.cz. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: SC Corinthians Paulista vs. CR Flamengo: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game between SC Corinthians Paulista and CR Flamengo, scheduled for March 22 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if SC Corinthians Paulista and CR Flamengo combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

markets.question: SC Corinthians Paulista vs. CR Flamengo: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game between SC Corinthians Paulista and CR Flamengo, scheduled for March 22 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both SC Corinthians Paulista and CR Flamengo each score at least one goal during the game.
